message:
Accessibility and code quality improvements across web app

SVG accessibility fixes:
- CostForecastChart.tsx, CostTrendChart.tsx: Change role="button" to role="graphics-symbol" for data points
  (buttons should be interactive elements, not visual indicators)

React key improvements (avoid array index keys):
- SafetyPosturePanel.tsx: Use composite key from issue+recommendation
- SnapshotSummaryPanel.tsx: Use issue/alert text as key (unique within list)

MobileAgentCard.tsx - Proper semantic button:
- Replace clickable div with actual <button> element
- Move onClick handler to button for proper accessibility
- Semantic HTML improves screen reader support and keyboard navigation

Import organization:
- checkpoint.test.ts: Move node:crypto import before external packages
- setup-readiness-integration.test.ts: Remove unnecessary blank line, alphabetize imports

Code formatting:
- cost-forecast.service.ts: Multi-line condition formatting
- skeletons: Minor test and component cleanup
- useCAAM.ts: Import organization

Also includes routine beads metadata updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
